reviews.review_description: If you want a bad money waster horrible android type game like this then get it. It’s literally like a shi android truck simulator turned into vr so you can imagine how bad that’ll be over all its cheap game should be paying us for playing.

The graphics are nice, but everything else is very poor in design. Nothing works in the cab of the truck. I could not get the truck to stay in reverse. It would be nice to use the gear shift to do this. I also had problems with the parking brake. It would be nice to just push the button on the dashboard. And the mirrors do not work seem to work right when backing up. ???

It is apparent that the designers of this app never drove a truck.

I find the controls confusing - it would be better to use hand tracking not the controllers. I would just prefer to drive on motorways and long distance - not keep on the carpark short setting, although I have only completed a few rounds - access to radio rather than the truck sound would be great too

developer_response.body: Thankyou for your feedback! We're currently working on incorporating longer routes into the game. You'll see all these enhancements soon. Stay tuned for the updates!

reviews.review_description: I will enjoy more if you add long routes. Overall   good experince.

developer_response.body: Dear User, Thank you for your feedback. We'll incorporate your suggestions in coming updates. If you have any other suggestions please let us know at info@tulipapps.com.

Dear User, we are very sorry to see that game is not working at your end. Please let us know more about issue you are facing relating to our game or any specific thing that you do not like about our game at info@tulipapps.com. We are always striving to improve our game for users. Thank you so much for playing our game.

reviews.review_description: Truck parking game is really awesome game. I love the feel that I get. I need it to drive through mountain and highways. Also please add more custom dashboard buttons. Will love it if I get more time variations and weather changes.

developer_response.body: Dear Player, Thank you for your positive feedback on our VR Truck Parking Simulator game! We're delighted to hear that you find it awesome and love the driving feel. Your suggestions for mountain and highway routes, additional custom dashboard buttons, and more time and weather variations are duly noted. We're working on updates to enhance your trucking experience. Happy parking!
